codeReview.summary: Implementation fully covers the feature requirements. Added load_from_spec_file(), query_codebase_for_evidence(), verify_implementation_status(), and verify_all_requirements() methods. The gap analyzer now reads frozen specs, extracts requirements, queries the codebase via ripgrep for implementation evidence, and outputs missing items with spec requirement text and file references. 18 tests pass, clippy clean.

issues.description: Unused variable `report` in test test_gap_analyzer_mock_spec_with_missing_items. The variable is assigned but never used. Consider prefixing with underscore: `_report`.

summary: Feature orch-gap-analyzer passes review. The implementation properly wires gap_analyzer.rs to read frozen specs, query the codebase for implementation evidence using ripgrep, and output missing items with spec requirement text and file references. 18 gap_analyzer tests pass including 4 new tests verifying codebase querying behavior. No MockLlm or test doubles in production paths. Code is clean with proper error handling. Clippy passes with no warnings.
